system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Athletics TN 6
Type: Stance (Formation)
Qi: 2

You pair up with an ally who is missing the opposite arm from yourself. Together your strikes achieve greater potency and flow. Unlike other Stances, this one requires a skill roll to use non-Cathartically. On a Success you may both Attack normally at the same time for the next 2 rounds. You each do one Extra Wounds on successful Attacks and your Parry score increases by a number equal to your Waijia ratings. Requirement: You must have the Missing Limb Flaw and the One-Armed Swordsman Technique to use this (it can be used with characters who are missing legs rather than arms). This must be used in coordination with someone who also has the Missing Limb Flaw, this Kung Fu Technique and their missing limb must be the opposite arm of your own. Cathartic: When used Cathartically you do 2 Extra Wounds.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: You must have the Missing Limb Flaw and the One-Armed Swordsman Technique to use this (it can be used with characters who are missing legs rather than arms). This must be used in coordination with someone who also has the Missing Limb Flaw, this Kung Fu Technique and their missing limb must be the opposite arm of your own.
system.catharticEffect: When used Cathartically you do 2 Extra Wounds.
system.formationNotes: Requires at least 2 participants. Formation can be broken by a Total Success attack against it.
